UMass Amherst Off-Campus Housing

See Floor Plans

Welcome to Sugarloaf Estates, offering the perfect mix of comfort, convenience, and scenic beauty for those seeking apartments near UMass Amherst. Nestled at the foot of Sugarloaf Mountain and just minutes from downtown Amherst, our community provides easy access to campus via the PVTA bus line and is one of the most desirable choices for UMass Amherst apartments. Spacious two-bedroom layouts, available furnished or unfurnished, include heat, hot water, and high-speed internet, while resort-style amenities like a sparkling pool, pet-friendly living for all sizes, and 40 acres of open space make every day feel like a retreat. Whether you're a student searching for the best in UMass Amherst off-campus housing or a local resident seeking a welcoming apartment community, Sugarloaf Estates delivers an unbeatable lifestyle in Sunderland near Amherst MA!

2 Bedroom Apartment Floor Plans & Availability

Experience the perfect combination of modern comfort and classic New England charm at Sugarloaf Estates—your top choice for Sunderland apartments and UMass Amherst off campus housing. Our spacious two-bedroom apartment homes are thoughtfully designed with stylish kitchens featuring granite-style countertops, sleek cabinetry, and stainless-steel appliances. Enjoy the convenience of generous closets with built-in shelving and the ease of an in-home washer and dryer. For added value, our UMass Amherst apartments include heat, hot water, and high-speed internet, with fully furnished options available to make your move even easier. Whether you’re a student looking for a quiet, comfortable retreat or a professional seeking convenience near campus, Sugarloaf Estates offers a welcoming and well-appointed space to call home.

Apartments Near Downtown Amherst

Nestled in the scenic town of Sunderland, Massachusetts, Sugarloaf Estates offers the perfect balance of peaceful countryside charm and convenient access to vibrant college‑town life. Ideally located just 15 minutes from UMass Amherst, our community is a top choice for students seeking UMass Amherst off campus housing and UMass Amherst apartments, with effortless access to campus via the PVTA bus line. Sunderland’s small‑town atmosphere is surrounded by breathtaking views of Sugarloaf Mountain, lush farmland, and opportunities for outdoor adventure, including hiking, biking, and kayaking. As part of the prestigious Five Colleges region, our location places you in the heart of a thriving academic and cultural hub. From exploring Amherst’s lively dining and shopping scene to visiting local favorites like Wild Roots, everything you need is close to home. Discover why our Amherst apartments at Sugarloaf Estates deliver the ideal mix of convenience, community, and the natural beauty of Western Massachusetts.

Exceptional Service at Your Amherst Apartments

At Sugarloaf Estates, excellence isn’t just our goal—it’s our way of life. Our dedicated leasing and maintenance teams go above and beyond to make sure your living experience exceeds expectations, providing exceptional customer service in every interaction. As one of the most welcoming Sunderland apartments communities, Sugarloaf Estates is more than just a place to live—it’s a supportive, connected neighborhood where our team takes pride in delivering the best living experience near UMass Amherst.
